title: Cranberry Walnut Chicken Salad
description: Easy chicken salad filled with tender chicken, dried cranberries, walnuts, celery or apple, dill, and parsley. Use Greek yogurt in the dressing and serve over lettuce for a lighter option.

items: ¼ cup sour cream or plain Greek yogurt
3 cups chopped or shredded cooked chicken
½ cup finely chopped celery or finely chopped apple

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, sour cream or yogurt, lemon juice, parsley, and dill.
Add the remaining ingredients and stir until combined. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve chilled on bread or lettuce.

notes.label: To toast walnuts
notes.text: Place walnuts in a dry skillet over medium heat. Cook, stirring frequently, for about 5 minutes, until fragrant and toasted. Watch them carefully so they don't burn. Cool before adding to the chicken salad.
